scripts.test: vitest run --environment jsdom tests/apiBase.test.ts tests/loginGate.test.tsx tests/terminalGrouping.test.ts tests/terminalNotifications.test.ts tests/terminalTree.test.ts tests/uiEvents.test.ts tests/gitDiff.test.ts tests/terminalFit.test.ts tests/keyboardShortcuts.test.ts tests/terminalQuickKeys.test.ts tests/terminalQuickInput.test.tsx tests/mobileShortcutFab.test.tsx tests/onboardingTour.test.tsx tests/settingsModal.test.tsx tests/clientList.test.tsx tests/notificationCenterLayout.test.ts tests/terminalClipboard.test.ts tests/terminalTouchScroll.test.ts tests/terminalVirtualClipboardButtons.test.tsx tests/folderTree.test.tsx tests/agentConfigViewer.test.tsx tests/projectTerminalPicker.test.tsx tests/userPreferences.test.ts
scripts.electron:start: npm run build && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron .
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
